operation_log.title: AI Response
operation_log.content:
Hello! I'm your helpful customer support assistant for Swiss Airlines. I'm here to assist you with your travel needs, including flight information, bookings, hotel reservations, car rentals, and general travel recommendations.

I can see you have two upcoming flights booked:
1. **Flight AA100** from LAX to JFK on April 21, 2026 at 08:00 (Economy class, seat 12A)
2. **Flight DL300** from LAX to MIA on April 23, 2026 at 08:00 (Business class, seat 3C)

How can I help you today? Whether you need information about your flights, want to make changes, book additional services, or get travel recommendations, I'm here to assist!
